changeSet.author: gfh
changeSet.sql: UPDATE org_units SET code='CHAIR', name_ru_short='Председ.', name_kg_short='Төрага', display_order=0 WHERE id=1;
UPDATE org_units SET code='BLOCK-FIN', name_ru_short='Фин. блок', name_kg_short='Каржы блогу', display_order=10 WHERE id=2;
UPDATE org_units SET code='BLOCK-OPS', name_ru_short='Опер. блок', name_kg_short='Опер. блок', display_order=20 WHERE id=3;
UPDATE org_units SET code='DEP-FIN', name_ru_short='Финдеп.', name_kg_short='Каржы деп.', display_order=10 WHERE id=4;
UPDATE org_units SET code='DEP-RISK', name_ru_short='Деприсков', name_kg_short='Тобокел деп.', display_order=20 WHERE id=5;
UPDATE org_units SET code='DEP-IT', name_ru_short='ИТ-деп.', name_kg_short='ИТ-деп.', display_order=10 WHERE id=6;
UPDATE org_units SET code='DEP-LEGAL', name_ru_short='Юрдеп.', name_kg_short='Юр. деп.', display_order=20 WHERE id=7;
UPDATE org_units SET code='OTD-DEV', name_ru_short='Разраб.', name_kg_short='Иштеп чыг.', display_order=10 WHERE id=8;
UPDATE org_units SET code='OTD-INFRA', name_ru_short='Инфра', name_kg_short='Инфра', display_order=20 WHERE id=9;
UPDATE org_units SET code='DEP-HR', name_ru_short='HR-деп.', name_kg_short='HR-деп.', display_order=30 WHERE id=10;
